body:
### Slide tracking ref never resets across market navigations **Medium Severity** The `hasTrackedSlide` ref is never reset when `currentMarket` changes. Since `navigation.navigate` reuses the existing `MARKET_DETAILS` screen instance (no `push`, no `getId` on the route), and no `key` prop is provided on `PerpsRelatedMarkets`, the component stays mounted across market-to-market navigations. After the first scroll on any market's rail, `hasTrackedSlide.current` remains `true` permanently, silently suppressing slide analytics for all subsequent market detail pages in the session.
Additional Locations (1) - [`app/components/UI/Perps/Views/PerpsMarketDetailsView/PerpsMarketDetailsView.tsx#L1475-L1480`](https://github.com/MetaMask/metamask-mobile/blob/7652c52637f45f3f7be9193ea1b16b9cac7c25b5/app/components/UI/Perps/Views/PerpsMarketDetailsView/PerpsMarketDetailsView.tsx#L1475-L1480)
 
Reviewed by [Cursor Bugbot](https://cursor.com/bugbot) for commit 7652c52637f45f3f7be9193ea1b16b9cac7c25b5. Configure [here](https://www.cursor.com/dashboard/bugbot).
is this included on the racking repo

you should be able to call `limit` on the newest controller
Also, why 20?

body:
Would say not to include `Mobile` on the FF name

```suggestion
      remoteFeatureFlags?.perpsRelatedMarkets as unknown as
```
why do we use this? we should get the related markets from the markets on the category of the market youare looking at. not statically.
Fixed in db4a7c83adda270fd8ed19f6b3874ad92337b35c. Slide tracking now resets when the current market symbol changes, so market-to-market navigation can emit slide analytics again.
Out of scope for this PR — tracking-repo registration lives outside metamask-mobile; this PR keeps the mobile event usage and docs in this repo.
Out of scope for this PR — same tracking-repo registration concern as above; this mobile PR does not own that external registry.
Fixed in db4a7c83adda270fd8ed19f6b3874ad92337b35c. Removed the local 20-item cap; the current @metamask/perps-controller 6.3.0 API does not expose a getMarkets limit parameter.

body: Fixed in db4a7c83adda270fd8ed19f6b3874ad92337b35c. The selector now reads the remote flag as perpsRelatedMarkets without the Mobile suffix.
Fixed in db4a7c83adda270fd8ed19f6b3874ad92337b35c. Related markets now derive from the market category fields instead of static symbol collections.

### Unnecessary intermediate variable `renderedMarkets` is just an alias **Low Severity** `renderedMarkets` is assigned directly from `markets` with no transformation — it's a no-op alias. This looks like a leftover from a previously removed `.slice()` or `.filter()` call (the PR discussion references a reviewer asking "why 20?", suggesting a limit existed earlier). The variable adds unnecessary indirection; `markets` can be used directly in the `useMemo`, length check, and `.map()`.
 
Reviewed by [Cursor Bugbot](https://cursor.com/bugbot) for commit db4a7c83adda270fd8ed19f6b3874ad92337b35c. Configure [here](https://www.cursor.com/dashboard/bugbot).
